description: Register a StripeResource wrapping the Stripe Python SDK for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var holding Stripe secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...)

name: Stripe Resource
